# Cross-check facts extracted from a REAL published TinyTapeout GDS-mode submission,
# tt_um_analog_mux, used to validate the template against a real design (not just
# TinyTapeout's own template). Units are DBU (1 dbu = 1 nm). Sources (fetched
# 2026-07-06):
#   https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TinyTapeout/tt-analog-mux/main/config.json
#   https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TinyTapeout/tt-analog-mux/main/def/tt_block_1x2.def
#
# config.json: "DESIGN_NAME": "tt_um_analog_mux", "DIE_AREA": "0 0 168.36 225.76",
#   "RT_MAX_LAYER": "met4", and the comment "don't use power rings or met5".
design_name tt_um_analog_mux
config_die_max_x 168360
config_die_max_y 225760
top_routing_layer met4
met5_forbidden true
#
# Its committed floorplan DEF def/tt_block_1x2.def: DESIGN tt_um_template ;
#   DIEAREA ( 0 0 ) ( 168360 225760 ) ;  (same 1x2 family, same 225.76um height).
def_die_max_x 168360
def_die_max_y 225760
